name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
authority: National Health Authority, Govt of India
coverage_amount: Up to Rs 5,00,000 per family per year
notes: SECC-based eligibility; covers secondary and tertiary hospitalisation at empanelled hospitals.

name: Aarogyasri (Rajiv Aarogyasri)
authority: Telangana State Aarogyasri Health Care Trust
notes: For white ration card holders; cashless at network hospitals.

name: Chief Minister's Relief Fund (medical)
notes: One-time assistance for serious illness; process varies by state.
